alkylation reagent: alkylated by chloroacetamide (20 mM final concentration, 15 min, room temperature)
alkylation concentration: alkylated by chloroacetamide (20 mM final concentration, 15 min, room temperature)
cleavage agent: Samples were reduced and alkylated followed by chloroform-methanol precipitated, reconstituted in 100 mM EPPS (pH 8.5), digested by Lys-C and then by trypsin.
collision energy: MS2 scans were performed in the ion trap with CID fragmentation (isolation window 0.7 Da; rapid scan; NCE 35%).
enrichment method: purification with streptavidin resin and TMT-based proteomics
fractionation method: High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
fragmentation method: MS2 scans were performed in the ion trap with CID fragmentation (isolation window 0.7 Da; rapid scan; NCE 35%).
instrument: Samples were analyzed on Orbitrap Tribrid Serie mass spectrometers coupled to a Proxeon EASY-nLC pump (ThermoFisher Scientific).
labeling: purification with streptavidin resin and TMT-based proteomics
reduction reagent: reduced by 5 mM TCEP (10 min, room temperature)
reduction concentration: reduced by 5 mM TCEP (10 min, room temperature)
